ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area where the property is located */,
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the floor where the property is located */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room within the property */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property code */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., available, rented, sold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_floor_id FOREIGN KEY ("floor_id") REFERENCES floors ("floor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the area is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the area is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "floors" (
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each floor */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Number of the floor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the floor */,
  "elevator_access" INTEGER /* Whether the floor has elevator access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("floor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_number" INTEGER /* Number of the room */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., bedroom, living room, kitchen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code */,
  "code_name" TEXT /* Name of the code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code */,
  "code_type" TEXT /* Type of code (e.g., property type, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the price belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the property */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the price expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the agreement belongs to */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the agreement */,
  "rent" TEXT /* Rent amount */,
  "security_deposit" TEXT /* Security deposit amount */,
  "lease_term" INTEGER /* Length of the lease term in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_agreements_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_agreements_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the tenant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the request belongs to */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the request (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, maintenance staff, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agreement the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES rental_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the inspection was performed on */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
